glosses.vi: tình trạng hôn nhân; tình trạng dân sự

sentences.target: Ich brauche eine Urkunde über den Personenstand.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈuːɐ̯kʊndə ˈyːbɐ deːn pɛʁˈzoːnənʃtant./

translations.de: Ich brauche eine Urkunde über den Personenstand.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈuːɐ̯kʊndə ˈyːbɐ deːn pɛʁˈzoːnənʃtant./
translations.en: I need a certificate of civil status.
translations.es: Necesito un certificado de estado civil.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’un certificat d’état civil.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un certificato di stato civile.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一份婚姻状况证明。
translations.yue: 我要一份婚姻狀況證明。
translations.ru: Мне нужна справка о семейном положении.
translations.pt: Preciso de um certificado de estado civil.
translations.he: אני צריך אישור על מצב משפחתי.
translations.vi: Tôi cần giấy xác nhận tình trạng hôn nhân.
translations.nl: Ik heb een verklaring van burgerlijke staat nodig.
translations.uk: Мені потрібна довідка про сімейний стан.
translations.hi: मुझे वैवाहिक स्थिति का प्रमाणपत्र चाहिए.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en attest for sivilstand.
translations.id: Saya perlu surat keterangan status perkawinan.
translations.sv: Jag behöver ett intyg om civilstånd.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de un certificat de stare civilă.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en attest på civilstand.
translations.ja: 婚姻状況の証明書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Urkunde'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating the topic.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner for 'Personenstand'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Ich muss meinen Personenstand beim Standesamt ändern.
sentences.reading: /ɪç mʊs ˈmaɪ̯nən pɛʁˈzoːnənʃtant baɪ̯m ˈʃtandəsˌʔamt ˈɛndɐn./

translations.de: Ich muss meinen Personenstand beim Standesamt ändern.
translations.ipa: /ɪç mʊs ˈmaɪ̯nən pɛʁˈzoːnənʃtant baɪ̯m ˈʃtandəsˌʔamt ˈɛndɐn./
translations.en: I have to change my civil status at the registry office.
translations.es: Tengo que cambiar mi estado civil en el registro civil.
translations.fr: Je dois faire modifier mon état civil au service de l’état civil.
translations.it: Devo cambiare il mio stato civile all’ufficio di stato civile.
translations.zh-Hans: 我得去婚姻登记处变更我的婚姻状况。
translations.yue: 我要去登記處更改我嘅婚姻狀況。
translations.ru: Мне нужно изменить семейное положение в ЗАГСе.
translations.pt: Tenho que alterar meu estado civil no registro civil.
translations.he: אני צריך לשנות את המצב המשפחתי בלשכת רישום האוכלוסין.
translations.tr: Medeni halimi nüfus müdürlüğünde değiştirmem gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi phải thay đổi tình trạng hôn nhân tại cơ quan đăng ký hộ tịch.
translations.ar: يجب أن أغيّر حالتي الاجتماعية في مكتب الأحوال المدنية.
translations.nl: Ik moet mijn burgerlijke staat wijzigen bij de burgerlijke stand.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно змінити сімейний стан у РАЦСі.
translations.hu: A családi állapotomat az anyakönyvi hivatalban kell módosítanom.
translations.hi: मुझे रजिस्ट्रार कार्यालय में अपनी वैवाहिक स्थिति बदलनी है.
translations.pl: Muszę zmienić stan cywilny w urzędzie stanu cywilnego.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αλλάξω την οικογενειακή μου κατάσταση στο ληξιαρχείο.
translations.nb: Jeg må endre sivilstanden min hos Folkeregisteret.
translations.id: Saya harus mengubah status perkawinan di kantor catatan sipil.
translations.sv: Jag måste ändra mitt civilstånd hos Skatteverket.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-mi schimb starea civilă la oficiul de stare civilă.
translations.cs: Musím si změnit rodinný stav na matrice.
translations.da: Jeg skal ændre min civilstand hos Borgerservice.
translations.ja: 市役所の戸籍課で婚姻状況を変更しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement ('ändern').
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Personenstand' (1st person singular possessor).
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'ändern'.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'beim'.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Sie müssen den Personenstand hier eintragen.

translations.de: Sie müssen den Personenstand hier eintragen.
translations.en: You have to enter the civil status here.
translations.es: Tiene que escribir el estado civil aquí.
translations.fr: Vous devez indiquer l’état civil ici.
translations.it: Deve inserire lo stato civile qui.
translations.zh-Hans: 请在这里填写婚姻状况。
translations.yue: 你要喺呢度填婚姻狀況。
translations.pt: Você precisa informar o estado civil aqui.
translations.he: צריך למלא כאן את המצב המשפחתי.
translations.vi: Bạn phải điền tình trạng hôn nhân vào đây.
translations.nl: U moet hier de burgerlijke staat invullen.
translations.hu: Itt kell megadni a családi állapotot.
translations.hi: आपको यहाँ वैवाहिक स्थिति दर्ज करनी होगी.
translations.el: Πρέπει να συμπληρώσετε εδώ την οικογενειακή κατάσταση.
translations.nb: Du må føre opp sivilstand her.
translations.id: Anda harus mengisi status perkawinan di sini.
translations.sv: Du måste fylla i civilstånd här.
translations.ro: Trebuie să treceți aici starea civilă.
translations.ja: ここに婚姻状況を記入してください。

tokens.explanation: Courtesy pronoun in nominative; formal 'you' functioning as subject; takes plural verb agreement.
Modal auxiliary, present; form agreeing with formal 'Sie'; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner for 'Personenstand'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'eintragen'.
Local adverb; specifies place and modifies the verb phrase.
Infinitive lexical verb with separable prefix 'ein-'; complement of 'müssen'. Not split here.

translations.en: The civil status is missing on the form.
translations.es: Falta el estado civil en el formulario.
translations.fr: L’état civil manque dans le formulaire.
translations.it: Nel modulo manca lo stato civile.
translations.ru: В форме не указано семейное положение.
translations.pt: Falta o estado civil no formulário.
translations.vi: Trong mẫu đơn thiếu mục tình trạng hôn nhân.
translations.nl: Op het formulier ontbreekt de burgerlijke staat.
translations.uk: У формі не вказано сімейний стан.
translations.hu: A nyomtatványból hiányzik a családi állapot.
translations.hi: फॉर्म में वैवाहिक स्थिति नहीं है.
translations.el: Στη φόρμα λείπει η οικογενειακή κατάσταση.
translations.id: Di formulir ini tidak ada status perkawinan.
translations.ja: この書類に婚姻状況の記載がありません。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'Im'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates absence.
